creator: jailbird@fdf.net
text:
I tried to come up with a logical explanation of how those two freeswitch files got in there. The only one I can come up with is that I'm an idiot :).

I've had them laying around for over a year, and the only thing I can think of is I must have accidentally ran 'git add -A' and then missed them in the diffstat.  Sorry!
